Andre and his team are absolute rockstars. If you’re looking for a firm that will fight for you and treat you like more than just a case number, look no further. I wouldn’t trust anyone else.

Andre and his team handle each case with care and professionalism, fighting the insurance company for the maximum result. Highly recommend!

After getting into my car wreck, I called Jim Ross and his main concern was my well-being. Jim and his group made sure that I had everything that I needed to get better from my injuries and at no cost to me including surgeries. The entire process was made as painless as possible all the way until the end. I am very grateful for what Jim and his team did for me, I know that I couldn't have done it all on my own with our same results.. I HIGHLY RECOMMEND Jim Ross for a Personal Injury Attorney. He will fight for his clients, like he fought for me!!

reviews.text:
They are dishonest and they did destroyed my family in the process

I hired them in my divorce and basically didn’t get nothing and charged me 3000
Even kept what left of the balance

Always will be a god who takes care of people who was robbed and treated unjustly.

If you value your time, avoid bringing your problems here. I have had my divorce forgotten about three times now. Twice was because the attorney or paralegal “no longer works there”. It takes months for any progress to be make at all and you will need to call to remind them you exist. On top of that they will charge you a monthly admin fee, charge you for calling even after three months of no communication on two separate occasions. I have also called and paid my bill just to receive the same exact bill a week later again, with no progress being made. Every time I speak to someone new because they have turn overs and it is more of a headache to deal with “my attorneys” than the courts. If I knew any of this before I would have gone a different route. It’s unbelievable they are allowed to conduct business and treat their clients like this. The office however is well maintained and most of the staff are very friendly.

Edit: my ex wife and I have already agreed to everything being done and we just needed the legal actions to be made on our behalf and it has still taken almost a year and a half with the delays caused by this firm. I’m not saying anyone else would’ve been perfect but I’m sure it would’ve been better.

I Did hired this firm unfortunately by mistake I paid him for good amount of time after few years I find out this law firm it just nothing just as a joke & bizarre a lost almost 4  Family And Business Cases plus so many of my evidence for my case has been lost in this office I never recovered anymore also thousand and thousand Dollars paid them 😡😡!!!!!!

PLEASE DO NOT DUE BUSINESS WITH THEM  !!
GOOD GAWD ALMIGHTY, GOOD GAWD ALMIGHTY, HE KILLED HIM!! AS GOD AS  MY WITNESS HE IS BROKEN IN HALF!!! BAH GAWD KING!!!

I used this law firm five years ago and unfortunately, the attorneys did a poor job of representing my divorce case. During my temporary divorce hearing the original attorney provided no assistance nor direction regarding my decisions on child support so I decided to get another attorney from the firm. BIG MISTAKE. This attorney was more focused on his other bigger cases and devoted little to no time to mine. To make matters worse their legal assistants and staff did not do a good job of returning my calls in a timely manner. I had to make follow up calls and leave messages. I won't be using them again.

Don't expect to get a response if you are a client.  Don't expect to be informed about your case, even when you have asked and they haven't responded in months. If your attorney leaves the practice and they do send you an email stating your case will be assigned to another attorney within the firm, it won't be. When you send an email and ask which attorney your case has been assigned to, they won't respond. They just will not communicate with clients but they will send a bill each month. My bill was paid each month but I bet they'd respond if it wasn't. If this is the firm you want to retain, please do so. Your experience may be completely different but my experience, as a client was terrible.  The opposing party and I were in agreement with the action and the paperwork amounted to a few pages.  There is no reason for this action, that was agreed to in January, has not been finalized by the end of August.  And, there is no reason for a firm to fail to communicate with a client.

Months after a head injury, the decision making process is oftentimes one of the last improvements.  An injured brain is not visible and I did not understand why certain parts seemed ok while others were far from it.  I had never hired an attorney before and made a very poor decision on the first one.  After terminating that contract, I reached out to friends and co-workers for recommendations.  It was quite humbling and I refused to see myself as some sort of victim.  Eventually Pete was found.
When options were limited from many angles, he had the focused and stable brain I needed.  I am beyond grateful for his services and am extremely fortunate to have been his client.  In the coming years, his reputation will quietly grow exponentially across Texas.  It could not happen to a more genuine and diligent person.

I would definitely recommend using Wilson Trosclair & Lovins for anyone who was in an accident like ours. One can often feel powerless when going through a situation like ours, but don't feel that way.  Take the power back, and have WT&L help you as well.

I’d like to share some information about this firm. My mother passed away in the year 2021and after contacting this firm to represent me and my mother in her wrongful death they decided that they were too busy in another lawsuit to continue doing discovery on my mother’s death. They contacted me less than one month before her statue of limitation was up to say they wouldn’t be able to represent me. This is very unethical. They gave me a list of a few law Firms to call to see if I could find someone to represent me, but no one could now, due to the sensitivity of the statue of limitation coming up and I could no longer file this lawsuit due to the staff’s inconsistencies and unprofessionalism. Ted Lyons assistant, Mandy seemed to be disturbed to hear of the many calls I had made but none were returned. She apologized for the calls not being returned, and was going to investigate this info and get back with me. She claimed “we don’t run our office that way, so I will personally check into it.”Well, that was three weeks ago and as of yesterday Mandy is unethically now,  there are still no answers and she said yesterday that she spoke with Mr. Lyons and he’s not returned her call to let her know what he has decided to do. I did let Mandy know that this review will be taken place. Be careful. Make sure you know who you’re talking to and make notes. Maybe this won’t happen to somebody else.
The Statue of limitations is not a joke!
They knew this was a time sensitive case but they just don’t care!
I reported it to the Bar Association too!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Ms. Dutton, thank you for taking the time to review. I apologize that your experience didn't meet your expectations, and I am so sorry you feel this way. But let me clarify some of your statements and allegations. You chose to initiate contact with my firm two months before the date of your mother’s death, what you perceived as the “alleged” statute of limitations. Further, a lot of the complaints you had stemmed back to 2020. Historically, there is a lot of research and investigation needed to solidify a decision on the merits for a medical malpractice or wrongful death case. We could not realistically do that in two months. An attorney from my firm reviewed the facts you provided, and then we made a request for certain medical records from you, though we never received them. This firm also never formally executed a contract of employment with you. After not receiving the documents we requested a month before the “alleged” statute ran, we then provided to you in writing the names of two highly competent lawyers/firms in our area to contact, and let you know this firm was not going to handle the case. It is my understanding you did contact them, but unfortunately they rejected the case as well.
I do personally apologize if the delay of our decision to decline your case took longer than you expected. I will put some procedures in place to ensure this does not happen moving forward. I, as well as every lawyer in my firm strive to do our best always and I believe this firm’s reputation speaks to that.

reviews.text: Attorney Christy Hester and staff were extremely helpful handling my auto accident case. I would use them again, hopefully won't need to!

I hired this amazing team after I was injured in a car accident. They worked so hard to get me the treatments I needed and made sure I had nothing to worry about, except healing. They were so nice and showed great dedication to my well being and were so nice to work with.

Marquette Wolf and his powerful team are a Godsent to my 2 little girls (ages 4 & 8 at the time) and I. In a single moment, I became a homeless, single parent, shattered widow.
On Mon, Aug 31st, 2020, a propane explosion killed my husband and turned my home into matchsticks and toothpicks. In less than 48 hours, Marquette and his team of investigators had flown to MO and were on-site protecting me from all the ambulance chasers as well as the mere hope of any evidence left. I don't remember much that day when he arrived, I was very shaken and lifeless, but I do remember a still small voice within 5 mins of meeting Marquette that confirmed he was exactly who needed to be there. Not once in 777 days have, I ever questioned that confirmation.
His team went to priceless lengths of even digging through rebel and debris, while still burning hot, trying to find my husband's wedding ring from where his body was found.
Marquette was so accommodating with the healing process of my heart, patiently assisting me to attend every deposition and court hearing, while I tried desperately to understand exactly what happened in those moments that tragically stole my husband's life & all our dreams with our children and future.
I was confident that a wrongful death trial would somehow bring some kind of justice to the thoughtless actions of the guilty and he was willing to fight that fight with me till the end, simply because that was the closure I needed.  His word is IRON!
Now, over 2 years later, EVEN IF the outcome was different and didn't bring the financial security for a lifetime for my girls and I that it has - I would still choose this firm, I am confident God ordered our steps together!
Richard Mann and his team did a great job representing me. Would recommend them to anyone!

Christy Hester recently helped me with a personal injury case involving a car accident. Before hiring her, I had several medical bills and I was up against an insurance company that dragged their feet and tried their best to place fault elsewhere.  Christy stepped in and took care of it all!
Christy’s credentials are quite impressive, and she equally impressed me with her people skills.  She is an extremely competent, hard working, trustworthy attorney, and she navigated my case seamlessly.  She spent countless hours doing research and fighting hard for my case.   She proved how good she is at using tactics and negotiation techniques that allowed us to settle prior to going to court.  Christy has a caring attitude and was extremely attentive to my needs. The level of attention and results that I received greatly surpassed every expectation that I had!
If you need a personally injury attorney, I highly recommend Christy Hester and her team!

I thought I could manage working one on one with the Insurance Company on my own for a settlement without hiring an attorney! In the eleventh hour the Insurance Co. Mike Freden, was very professional, knowledgeable, realistic, and compassionate about my case!  By nature I’m very skeptical, Mike walked me through every possible scenario and I felt at ease and that he sincerely had my best interest at heart!

Suing someone is not fun but rather stressful to say the least!

Before hiring Mike, the Insurance Company treated me unfairly and did not want to be accountable for their clients confessed actions! The agent was rude, accusatory and insulting with all forms of communication!

Nevertheless, We had my deposition, then mediation and a Jury Trail was set in late July ‘20.
By the Grace of God and the do diligence of my extraordinary attorney Mike Freden we settled during mediation vs going to court!

I highly recommend Mike Freden! Great INTEGRITY, Honesty and an open line of communication!

That’s important in painful times and Give me his precious time to explain things ( at times it was repetition) like the process & what to expect...we may have to go over a few times, but he knew what it took to help me, have the patience and he understood this was my life and he responded immediately to me.
Nothing is coincidental and Mike Freden made me feel important!!
I was not the easiest client I’m sure, but Mike Freden is always thinking about Different angles of revenue to look at ....who does that-looks at all possibilities. I can’t say enough for his professional & human attentiveness.

But after the NeurOptimazation with Kim Brown, my mind improved. And he shared his pride in me as a friend would do.
So I was able to communicate with Mr. Freden much better but he still needed to be very patient with me...there’s a whole process of what we had to go through, he customized attention. reviews.text: If you wish to hire an attorney who will sue for all the money he thinks you might get and subject you to every medical test (needed or not needed) to win more money from insurance companies, then Nick is the attorney for you. If you wish to ask questions, proceed cautiously and use your own doctors, then Nick is not the attorney for you. When I asked questions at our initial meeting he said, "Am I wasting my time here? No one asks questions. They just sign the papers." I wanted an attorney who would listen to my questions and work with what our needs are. He also called and expected immediate responses, which was impossible due to the fact that I have small children with me and no child care. He even had the audacity to ask if I didn't care about my children, because I would not take them in for an MRI even though 2 (two) doctors examined my kids and said they did not need an MRI. In the end, working with Nick was a worse experience than the wreck we were in. And I know that he will reply to this and disparage me in his reply but know this: everything that I stated above is true. He is an attorney and will twist the story to make him look like the better person. You can do better. Find an attorney with more experience who will work for the person, not the 33.3% of the settlement.
reviews.ownerResponse:
I'm sorry to hear that you had a negative experience, Laura. To be fair, I always prioritize the well-being of my clients and make recommendations based on professional assessments to ensure the best possible outcome.

On communication, I strive for timely and clear responses, understanding the importance of each client's concerns. Regarding our meeting, I always encourage clients to ask questions to ensure they're fully informed throughout the process.

While every case is unique and comes with its challenges, I remain committed to providing the highest level of professionalism. If you have any further questions or issues, I'm more than willing to discuss them with you.

I wish you the best of luck with your case.

- Nick

reviews.text: Terrible service, I wouldn't recommend it to absolutely anyone. Extremely unprofessional and obviously inexperienced. They supposedly couldn't find the other car's insurance even though they had the license plate and other information. This information was given to us after they sent us to a clinic for medical tests and procedures. Now they've informed us that they can't continue with the case because they couldn't find the insurance of the car responsible for the accident, and we'll have to pay the clinic bills ourselves. In my opinion, they're scammers in cahoots with the clinic. I assume the first thing to do is find the car insurance company (which should cover all damages to both the vehicle and the injured parties) before sending the client for any medical procedures or other services. In conclusion, scammers, zero professionalism, zero ethics, zero experience. I don't know how they can call themselves lawyers (they couldn't logically answer any of my obvious questions since they obviously have no reason or explanation for such an atrocity). I hope my review helps others avoid falling into the hands of this so-called "law firm" and saves them time and money.

Also, he said he does payment plans and I can pay $50 or $100 a week.  I did that but every time I went to court he demanded $300 the first time and $450 the second.  He rushed me into making a decision and then left me with an 80+ year old man, who I've never met before, to go infront of the judge with.  I WOULD NOT RECOMMEND THIS GUY.
This Firm helped me with all my mom's paper work an I would recommend them to everyone.

Now truthfully Mr.  Beswick will scare you, he works so many different courts,  this is my third case he’s worked for me... all successfully..  when he struts into court hair comb back just right, nice suite and briefcase you observe the experience he has,  he signs in and goes to doing his crossword puzzle , and the entire time your wondering is he prepared not until you get before the judge do your truly see his talent,, brilliant .... and he’s affordable,, long as you’re meeting financial commitment  y’all structure he’s going to bat for you...ever time!!!  ...  basically he’s 💯

reviews.ownerResponse: Desiree, we strive to provide our clients with the best services and outcomes possible for their cases. However, each case is dependent on its facts. We believe that you obtained a more than favorable result given that your accident had a police report that deemed you were 100% at fault for the accident. Despite this, we took on your case and helped you and your children obtain medical treatment, we obtained a settlement amount for you and your children that covered your medical expenses and fees and we worked to reduce the medical expenses as much as possible to give you the best result we could.

Dear Jonathan,
We’re truly sorry to hear about your experience. This is not the level of service we strive to provide, and it’s important to us that we understand exactly what happened. We’ve reviewed our records but were unable to locate your case.

We’d appreciate the opportunity to look into this further and make things right if there was any confusion or error on our part. Please contact us directly at 1-855-663-4763 or 1-855-688-7756, or submit your information through our secure form so we can assist you promptly: https://form.jotform.com/251423540487052

We take all concerns seriously and remain committed to serving our community with transparency, respect, and professionalism.

reviews.text:
I would strongly caution anyone considering this law firm. We were told the case review would be free, and after thoroughly explaining every detail of our situation, the legal assistant assured us they had "great news" and could help with our case. Based on that promise, we were charged $150. The very next day, I received a call saying they had reviewed our case further and actually could not help us. I was then told we would be issued a refund. It’s now been almost a month, and despite follow-ups, we have not received our money back!!
This experience was incredibly disappointing and unprofessional. It feels like we were misled and taken advantage of. If you're looking for honest, trustworthy legal help, I suggest you look elsewhere. We feel scammed and would never recommend this firm to anyone!
reviews.ownerResponse:

She started off responsive, ended with lack of communication (THE ONLY CONSISTENCY IS CONSISTENT LACK OF COMMUNICATION),dismissive attitude,follow up dates (I was told that she would reach out by 2/11. She did not, I had to call her) given with no follow up unless I reached out. In the past 2 weeks, I’ve been switched to another negotiator due to that one moving on to new endeavors. I did not know this until I called (2/27) and tried to speak with the lady that had been assigned to me. I last communicated with her on 2/20(because I reached out of course). I am now assigned to a new person. We spoke, they seemed okay. Then BAM!!! There goes that inconsistency showing up again.
This is BEYOND frustrating.
Some lessons you don’t have to learn for yourself. Others have and in turn are willing to share with the class. Still wouldn’t recommend. Not even to my enemies.
My personal experience currently going through it is HORRIBLE.

When I initially retained the services of the Godsey Law Firm in September, the level of professionalism and communication I experienced was exemplary. At that time, our case representative was Amanda, and the experience was nothing short of outstanding. The staff was consistently courteous, responsive, and transparent in their communication. They ensured that no details were overlooked and kept us thoroughly informed throughout the process. I genuinely appreciated the professionalism displayed while navigating medical treatment and other aspects related to the case. I am certainly aware this law firm has thousands of clients, I feel I've been more than patient.
However, as we have progressed into March, my experience has changed significantly. My case is now being handled by another case manager and unfortunately, communication has become virtually nonexistent. Since September, I believe I have only spoken with her once, and that was on Valentine's Day of this year. Aside from that single interaction, I have been unable to reach her or receive any meaningful updates regarding the status of my case.
Each time I call the office, the receptionist attempts to assist but is unable to reach anyone associated with my case. I have even requested to speak directly with the attorneys involved, yet those attempts have also been unsuccessful. The receptionist has repeatedly informed me that my number would be marked as an emergency contact and that someone would return my call within three hours. Unfortunately, those promised callbacks have never occurred.
For context, my husband and I were involved in a car accident in September. He has already received his settlement, while I, the driver involved in the incident, remain completely uninformed about the progress of my own case. Every time I call seeking clarification or simply an update, I am met with silence and unreturned calls.
This level of disregard for client communication is deeply frustrating and, frankly, highly unprofessional. The firm began this process with remarkable service and attentiveness, but the current lack of responsiveness reflects a drastic decline in the quality of client care.
At this point, it seems my only remaining option is to leave a public review in hopes that someone within the firm will finally address my concerns and provide clarity regarding the status of my case. It is unfortunate that such measures even feel necessary simply to obtain basic communication about a legal matter that directly affects me.
T Nguyen

reviews.text: Thought they was go get me something I was hit from the back they gave the case ti a smaller firm

This is my first time going this route after having a minor accident and this is the most drawn out process ever. At the beginning, everything was moving along, my caseworker Morgan seemed knowledgeable, but was not good at giving advice or steering in what direction… You get sent off to PT and once PT ended that’s when things started to get drawn out way too long and repeatedly getting told it takes several weeks. Expect PT to be 2-3 months, Don’t expect to get paid out if you miss work for PT, that will be a loss, so I hope you got money saved up if you have to miss work and still pay bills… they will tell you it will take 10-12 weeks to get records from doctors offices/hospitals etc, once those are in, it will take 4-5 weeks to close your case, and then when your case is settled. Then you have to wait for them to close it out, that could be 2 weeks, and then another 4-5 weeks to get paid out.

My case has settled and James Rushing is my point of contact. I had my accident in beginning of June, it’s now November and I have not seen a check yet. It has been 8 weeks now and I have made several calls with no return calls from him. Very unprofessional and not being upfront with clients. Honestly, these folks are just telling clients 4-5 weeks and have no idea when anything will get closed or processed and once that time is up, they’re mia because they don’t know what to tell you. In my opinion! I even tried not to hound the law office and check in every 2 weeks, but no return calls still. All in all, will I go through this process again? No idea. Will I use this law firm? Most likely not after this experience.

I recently had the pleasure of working with the Godsey-Martin Law Firm for my auto accident case, and I cannot praise them enough for their professionalism and dedication. From our initial consultation to the resolution of my case, they maintained clear communication and made sure I understood every step of the process.

The attorneys at Godsey-Martin Law are not only knowledgeable but also genuinely caring. Juan Aguirre and Manal Kattan took the time to listen to my concerns, answered all my questions promptly, and provided thoughtful guidance throughout the ordeal. Their expertise was evident, and it was clear they had my best interests at heart.

One of the standout aspects of their service was their thorough approach to gathering evidence and building my case. They worked diligently to ensure that all necessary documentation was in order, which ultimately led to a favorable outcome. I was impressed by their negotiation skills, which ensured that I received a fair settlement for my injuries and damages.

Additionally, the support staff, including Felayne Cruz and Josie Monconduit, were incredibly helpful and always available to assist with any administrative tasks or inquiries I had. This level of support made a challenging situation much easier to navigate.

Overall, I highly recommend the Godsey-Martin Law Firm to anyone in need of legal representation for an auto accident case. Their commitment, expertise, and compassionate service make them an excellent choice. Thank you for a job well done!

reviews.text: At the end of 2023, I got in a car accident where I was t-boned. I was recommended to reach out to Lawyer Wilson. He immediately took my case, walked me through what to do and helped me get medical treatment within months. After that, it was just waiting. It is a long journey. I won't deny that there was time when I was confused and doubted this whole process, since everyone around me keep asking about my case and saying that it shouldn't take this long. I brought my frustration to Wilson, and he assured me every single time that I just need to trust him and let him handle it. I just received a new from him that he has secured a settlement, and the compensation is honestly more than what I expected after 2 years of waiting. I would say that if you want quick process then you won't get good result. He won't help you get just the minimum. He'll fight to give you a well-deserved compensation. All you need to do is trusting him. Set your case aside and let him do his work. I just wish there would be more update during the waiting time. But then honestly I just need to give him a call and he will update me. He's really responsive with phone call. Now I'm just waiting for my case to end, and thanks anh Wilson for helping me.
Thank you Wilson for answering my questions and concerns and gave us some valuable insight
I highly recommend His services to anyone looking for a knowledgeable and trustworthy attorney. Thank you again for all your help!

Wilson handled my slip-and-fall injury case with real compassion and professionalism.
He communicated clearly throughout and fought hard to get me compensated fairly. I
never felt like just another case. I can tell he genuinely cares about his clients.

In early 2024, I was involved in a serious motor vehicle accident where I was rear-
ended at a red light. The other driver denied fault, and their insurance company was
giving me the runaround. A friend recommended The Law Office of Wilson Hung Vu,
and reaching out to them was the best decision I made. Mr. Vu took my case seriously
from day one — he walked me through every step, helped me get proper medical
treatment, and dealt directly with the insurance company so I didn’t have to stress. He
was incredibly responsive and explained everything in plain English (and Vietnamese
when my parents had questions!). After a few months of investigation and negotiation,
he secured a fair settlement that covered all my medical bills, vehicle repairs, and more.
What impressed me most was how he treated me like a person, not just a case number.
I highly recommend his office if you’re ever in an accident and need someone honest,
sharp, and truly on your side.

Professional, honest, and truly bilingual. Mr. Vu helped me with a contract dispute
involving my startup, and I felt supported every step of the way.
Very dedicated to helping the community. Thank you very much, Tammy.
Amazing staff and service. Mr. Hung helped my family and I with our case and was very professional and helpful.
Really helpful! Great lawyer

I've never given a business a 1-star review before, but this one deserves it. The service was poor and not worth the price. I won’t be returning. He is rude and unprofessional. He might claim this review is fake, as he did with another, but while the account may be disputed, the money lost is very real.
reviews.ownerResponse:
We take customer feedback very seriously and are committed to providing exceptional service to our clients. We firmly believe this review is not genuine. As part of our commitment to maintaining a trustworthy online presence, we will be reporting this review to Google for further investigation regarding its authenticity.

Sincerely,
The Law Office of Wilson Hung Vu, P.C.

reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear David: When we met so you could receive your settlement check, there was no mention of any issues. Because the case had such a good financial result for you, I thought you were pleased. In fact, I remember you smiling during our meeting.

The circumstances of your case, which went to litigation and approached a trial setting, were not simple in light of your disappearance for many, many months and not engaging in the case during that time. You may recall we had to reach out to your family in the hopes of finding you. Your reasons for disengaging, I recall, had nothing to do with our firm and the details will remain confidential.

I later saw this review. I must note that your review coincided with my telling you to stop harassing the staff on the telephone by calling repeatedly one day demanding payment before the funds were available for disbursement. Because the ladies working here were upset by your words and demeanor, I sternly spoke to you. In retrospect, I could have treated you with a softer touch in light of your condition. I truly thought we had gotten past that episode especially in light of our subsequent communication and the significant check you received. In the future, I hope your life settles down and you find happiness.

reviews.text: My experience with this law firm was very disappointing and very vary terrible. If I could give 0 stars I would!! Don’t waste your time with this law firm. It took them almost 2 years, not couple months BUT 2 YEARS!! to find answers from the other insurance and only for them to tell me that the driver did NOT have coverage. How does it take 2 YEARS!!?? That’s the first thing insurances say. The attorney himself was trying to victimize the other driver who was AT FAULT saying he didn’t have money to pay for damages. That is NOT ON ME. Let’s not forget that the communication between the law firm and I, horrible experience. It is hard to get someone to pick up the phone and when they do they’re very VERY rude. Let it be known that I had to call the attorneys office every other month for about a year with no answer.  I also had to call the office to get the attorney to tell me my case was not getting paid. Never have I had to call to get an update from another law firm, NEVER. This law firm will give you FALSE hope on your case and not help. Save your time!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Ms. Medina: I have attached an edited portions of our communications with you which explains our efforts on your behalf:

Thank you for taking the time to speak with me. As you know, this has been a difficult case for several reasons. First, of course, is the damage to your car and your health due to the accident. Those problems were compounded when the insurance companies denied responsibility and/or coverage. For example, your own policy did not have any PIP or property damage coverage to cover any of your losses. In addition, the insurance company of the car behind you denied responsibility and later denied coverage. You will recall that you and your first law firm (not us) asked our firm to seek a resolution through the court system with your permission. We filed suit.

During this time, we had to go to Court just to get service on the other driver with the lawsuit. The Defendant cursed and threatened to harm our process server if the process server attempted to serve him. We asked the Court to allow our process server to post the lawsuit on his door instead of personal service. The Court agreed and granted an Order allowing us to do so. In turn, we served the Defendant by posting the lawsuit on his door by Court Order.

We later received a notice that the other driver's insurance company denied having coverage for him at the time of the wreck. Since you didn’t have Uninsured Motorist Coverage, we could not obtain funds from your insurance company.

Ultimately, we filed a Motion for Default Judgment. Attached to this email is a Judgement signed by the Court which concludes that the driver who caused your injuries is responsible. The Judge also ordered that you should recover $17,530.00 from him. Unfortunately, as I mentioned, the driver’s insurance company has claimed it did not have an active policy of insurance for him during the time of the wreck. As a result, we have not collected any funds as a result of this judgment.

Hopefully you will see, after reviewing this Judgment in your favor, that our firm continued to work on your behalf and made big strides to try and get you relief. We did not give up when the other parties refused to respond. We continued to seek relief all the way up to a judgment - and it cost us a good deal of money to do so. We are sorry that there is not
insurance money to cover this Judgment, however.

reviews.text:
I don’t usually write reviews, but I wish I had seen one like this before hiring them.

When I first met John and Paul, they were overly warm and full of reassuring promises. They insisted they would “handle everything” after my car accident. That could not have been further from the truth.

They struggled to handle even the most basic step: securing a rental car. What should have taken days turned into weeks of conflicting stories:
•	“The insurance company is still investigating” (even though the police report already stated fault clearly)
•	“They need the driver to admit guilt” (nonsensical)
•	“The policy number was wrong”
•	Then they suddenly asked if police even came to the scene — something we had already discussed multiple times, with the report already in their possession.

I finally contacted the at-fault insurance company myself.
To my shock, the claims manager told me John and Paul had only contacted them three times. Not “daily,” not “in constant communication” — just three times. The adjuster didn’t even recognize their names.

When liability was eventually accepted, they took credit for it — though they had done nothing.

Then I got a sudden call from the rental company demanding the car back immediately or I’d face financial penalties. I learned that USAA had already issued a settlement that I was never informed about. When I confronted John, he acted confused, changed the subject, and even brought up my deceased father — something he already knew about. He then began recording the call without acknowledgment and suggested I lie and lock my credit card to avoid charges. A lawyer advising fraud. What a blowing red flag.

USAA later explained that John had ignored their calls and emails. They provided proof which made their lies sickening. And because his first letter instructed them to contact him only, I had been completely kept out of the process. I accepted a low offer because I didn’t know negotiations were possible (neither advised me of this even though they would assure transparency) and I needed transportation to work and school.

And here’s the part that says everything:
When USAA realized how poorly we had been handled, they sent an additional check themselves out of basic human decency. John then tried to take credit for that too, though he had nothing to do with it.

When John and Paul realized we now understood what had been happening, they abruptly withdrew from the case.

They like to mention their “faith” often. They like to talk about integrity, empathy, professionalism, community. But I learned that people can wrap themselves in holy language while behaving with none of its spirit. It’s all emotional and psychological manipulation and branding.

And no — recent positive reviews do not erase this.
They do not erase what happened to me or to other former clients I’ve personally spoken to who experienced similar patterns of neglect, dishonesty, and unprofessional conduct.

Their surface may appear polished, but their behavior underneath has not changed.

If you are considering hiring them: be cautious.
Charm is easy. Competence and integrity are not.
* I hoped they, too, have stopped with the CHATGPT or whatever AI technology they used to send nonsensical long replies. It was incredibly awkward and read inauthentic*

They would also draft payments without prior notice, even after I had provided specific instructions. Furthermore, I was not refunded my retainer after the case concluded. When I questioned an invoice prior to our decision to fire them, the attorney I was working with became argumentative and would not allow me to speak. Her attitude was consistently unpleasant. When I later called to request receipts for payments made, I was told they were experiencing technical issues and that my invoices should suffice. However, an invoice does not confirm payment. It is concerning that a firm handling such substantial amounts of money lacks proper accounting equipment. A simple receipt, they cannot provide. Save your money, Mr. Mathur has a good lip to sell, yet the outcome it's not as great as he sells it.

•	After requesting a refund for ineffective services, the firm ignored me for over a month and refused to return even my security deposit.

This firm is clearly more focused on money than client advocacy. They continued to charge me despite my concerns so I had to ask them to stop working on my case. When I asked for a refund they refused and even refused to refund my deposit, even though their representation had no impact on my case. I’m seriously considering filing a grievance with the state bar.

If you’re looking for an attorney who will genuinely fight for you, I strongly advise seeking legal representation elsewhere.
reviews.ownerResponse:
At Mathur Law Offices, we strive to provide the best possible service. This means we take any negative feedback as an opportunity to improve our services for our valued clients and potential clients.
In this instance, however, we are unable to determine who the complainant is, as no name was provided. More importantly, we received no prior feedback regarding negative impressions of this sort before the review was posted.
It is important to note that legal fees cannot accrue without a client’s consent. Clients must voluntarily make payments for legal fees to accrue, which occurs through a clear statement detailing the charges and a request for payment. No client is forced to pay fees, and every statement transparently outlines the date and time of service, the nature of the service provided, and the amount to be paid.
Furthermore, at our firm, Mr. Mathur implements cost-saving measures to help clients save money daily. These include, but are not limited to:
Advising clients against actions that may unnecessarily escalate fees without yielding a materially different result,
Streamlining workflows within the firm,
Setting parameters for work completion on a regular basis, and
Reviewing each case to ensure effective and efficient representation.
While the author of this complaint believes that Mr. Mathur or the firm is solely motivated by financial gain, that could not be further from the truth. We are dedicated to achieving results. Sometimes, those results take time and require financial investment.
In closing, no client accrues large legal fees without consenting to them on at least a monthly basis. No client suffers from a firm that is unaware of the costs of legal representation or fails to take steps to save both time and money. Additionally, no client can settle a case without full approval of the terms. If a client has approved a settlement, we are obligated to accept it—even if the offer was made long ago. We cannot settle cases without client approval.

reviews.text:
Let me start with, OMG! Mr Mathur is one of the BEST immigration/criminal lawyer out there!!.. I’ve taken forever to write this review  waiting for the perfect time to do so and I believe with the new president and current circumstances this is the perfect time to tell you how great Mr Mathur is … let me tell you my story, I will try to make it short. When I was in my early 20s I got in trouble with the law, can’t go much into details but I can tell you that my poor decisions got me detained at the airport when I was trying to enter the country back from a vacation. If you are a green card holder and you break the law, your green card will be taken away  and you will be detained at the airport, questioned for hours and possibly deported.
I was lucky, I was paroled to reentered the country and waited for a court date to go in front of an immigration judge to decide if I was allowed to stay in this country.. several weeks later I got a letter with my court date, at this point I’m freaking out because I could get deported if I didn’t have an attorney, so I search and search for many immigration attorney and  went to many appointments, some didn’t want to take my case and others would take my case but had me calling criminal lawyers to ask then questions about my criminal cases, I was so confused and desperate to find someone, and by the grace of GOD I found Mr Mathur!!.. when I met him he explained to me the reason why I was having trouble finding an attorney to represent me, i needed an immigration/criminal attorney and there is not many that can do both and in my case I needed both. Let me tell you, Mr Mathurs took my case and immediately got to work, he’s so intelligent and knowledgeable in what he does,  no other attorney I met during my search could compare to him.  7 years later, after a long  fight, rude immigration judges, back and forth in court, he won my case and I was granted to stay in the USA!!!… and as of 2023 I’m an American Citizen :) !!! He helped me get my citizenship too… There are no words to describe how grateful I am with Mr Mathur and to thank him for everything he has done for me, I can’t believe I was in process of deportation, paroled into this country and now im a US Citizen. I’m so blessed that I found Mr Mathur and I will Thank him for the rest of my life for helping me and fighting for me to stay here with my family.

Unfortunately I’ve been patient on writing this review for some time now but I’m actually fed up with this lawfirm. This has been the worst firm I’ve ever worked with, I did not even hire them directly, they were passed my case from another firm to take to lawsuit. When they got the case they still dragged months before even filing the suit and started everything over. They don’t listen to their clients wishes even when asked what you’d like to do. Communication is horrible it’s been now over a year since my accident. I’ve had to reach out FIVE different occasions recently, two of which were in writing just to get an update on my case since the last time I spoke to them in Oct 30th it’s now Jan. Then they act condescending when you call them out on the numerous attempts. Netti acted as if she didn’t even want to help after I was told from their receptionist everytime I called she was who handles my case. When I finally get Netti she gets on the phone and instead of any empathy she states she wasn’t available the last message left for her in a tone like she had better things to do. Apparently the other three calls weren’t enough she tells me she needs to pass it to the attorney. It wasn’t until I told them I was writing a review the attorney calls me within the hour. Everyone wants to be shocked when you finally inform them you are frustrated. I’d also like to add since I know cases take time I don’t even call for updates less than every 45-60 days only to find my case is still in the same position. If I don’t call them I never hear anything.They speak to you as if everyone is illiterate on how these work. Over a year and all the attorney could say today when I finally spoke to them is they were able to get the at fault drivers policy maxed at 30k. The same update I received via text Oct 30th. When I asked why their receptionist told me there was a note they had been reaching out to my insurance for under insured motorist coverage he acted as if he did not even know about that note and told me he was going to get back to me in a few hours. So they don’t even fully know who’s giving what details in their office. Ironically majority of their suit fees medical bills and the loan I took last year would probably eat whatever I do get completely they all seem to work with each other. Since Oct when I spoke with them and signed release for my check they’re still going in requesting reductions. If you’re looking for a firm that will aggressively work to try to get you every dime for the wait and inconvenience to your life this probably isn’t the best. I literally received 90k in less than a year from three different insurance companies plus PIP working with Witherite somehow the attorney tells me I couldn’t have gotten UIM from all three like I don’t have the records & releases. I would rather them state it’s not something they know how to do than to gaslight someone like they aren’t aware.  This case should not take this long it’s incredibly frustrating.

When they finally got things going on my case things went smoothly but everytime I would call and they said they would call me back they never do other than that this is a great place to go through if you ever get into an accident and it's not your fault

I highly recommend them …Sarah was nice an good working with she really  jumped on things an made it happen I told her I needed my money to get a vehicle an she made it happen 🙌

The referrals to the medical doctors, physical therapy and pain management, etc. were handled professionally by everyone. My calls, emails and questions were handled fast, professionally and efficiently in my opinion. If I should need SCV Law Firm again, they will be my first call.

I have been dealing with them since July 25th 2022 and still haven’t had anything settled as of yet. Still asking for calls back for my sons case since he is underage. Whatever you do  DO NOT use this firm. I thought they were going to try and help me and make this process so much easier since it was my very first accident and I’m new at this. Man was I wrong…worst experience ever with this firm.

My experience with SCV law firm was exceptional. Ellie is a very sweet person. She was more concerned about me receiving my money than I was. Overall the law firm got me more money than what I thought I was going to get. I would definitely recommend this law firm to anyone who has suffered trauma from an accident. Once again, thank you Ellie for all your hard work.

You can be 21 to get one in the state of Texas. She was dragging the case longer than it needed to be and laughed over the Phone while I was in distress. Also by law I am required to be emailed a withdraw letter regardless of how it’s done at your law firm. Legal assistant Sahari said she was going to break the law if she emailed it to me. He went above and beyond to make sure my father was treated fairly and received the best possible outcome. Throughout the process, he kept us informed, reassured, and confident that we were in the best hands. What really sets Mr. Todd Rash apart is the way he treats his clients like family. He doesn’t make you feel like just another case—he makes you feel like you truly matter. He’s honest, hardworking, and always available day or night to answer questions or offer guidance. It’s rare to find someone who combines skill, compassion, and integrity the way he does. Thank you Mr. Rash and hopefully Im not in a situation I need to hire you but if I am there is no question you are my one and only call..

I can not thank Todd Rash enough for all of his hard work and dedication to my case. He lifted such a burden and eased all of our fears.  You are truly a God send! Thank you from the bottom of my heart. 💜

**Review of Attorney Carlos Lopez and Firm**

Hiring Queenan Law Firm and being represented by Mr. Carlos Lopez was one of the most disappointing legal experiences I’ve ever had. Not only was I charged the 33.33% contingency fee stated in the contract, but he also added an additional **$3,457.34 in “other fees”**—after previously telling me it would only be $2,300 before I agreed to settle; mind you that it is not even us going to trial.

On top of that, Mr. Lopez got me into settling by telling me that if I went to trial, the other party would uncover my past workers’ compensation during discovery and that I would likely receive less money. I now see this as a tactic to push me into a settlement I was not comfortable with.

He also gave me **inconsistent and misleading information** about the at-fault party’s insurance policy. At first, Mr. Lopez told me the other party carried a **$100,000 policy limit**, but later he changed his story, saying he wasn’t sure and that it might only be **$50,000**. This kind of back-and-forth left me feeling like he was not being honest or simply not competent.

Throughout the process, I felt misled, mistreated, and at times like I was dealing with an **inexperienced intern rather than a licensed attorney.** Lies, miscommunication, and broken promises defined my entire experience. I even reached a point where I just wanted him off my case completely.

Because of this conduct, I will be filing a **formal complaint with the Texas State Bar** against Mr. Lopez. What he did was not right, and no client should ever have to go through what I experienced.

**DO NOT trust this firm with your case, and especially do not trust Mr. Carlos Lopez.** He did me wrong, and I would never recommend his services to anyone.

You could not find more capable and caring attorneys! Kevin Queenan, Carlos Lopez, and the rest of the team leave no stone unturned in their meticulous preparation, investigating every possible angle to secure outcomes that consistently exceed expectations. I would highly recommend them.

It is my desire to express my sincerest gratitude to you and the entire staff of Queenan Law Firm for all of your hard work, determination, and tenacity throughout my case.  When I was first injured, I was not sure where to turn to, but I am grateful to have found and entrusted you to handle my case. Throughout the time we worked together, I was always well informed and never kept in the dark about anything. I can not thank you enough for the amazing treatment. I hope our paths should never cross again(at least not for any other suits), but I know you are the law firm I will seek or recommend to any friend or family member.

My experience at Queenan Law Firm was amazing. My entire legal team went over and beyond the call of duty, and fought for everything that I’d was rightfully entitled to . They went over and beyond the call of duty to make sure I receive just that. I was intrigued with the constant courtesy, and hospitality that I received from queenan law firm. I was amazed with the level Of intelligence, prompt speed, and professionalism to resolve my case  in a timely manner. I was impressed, and I would definitely recommend Queenan Law  Firm to my family, friends, and associates, or to whom ever I have an encounter with that is looking for a dream team Law Firm to represent,  and Litigate your case. I can guarantee you won’t be disappointed, Thanks Again to my entire Legal team at , Queenan Law Firm, You guys are amazing. Respectfully submitted Min. Keith Lott

reviews.text: I don't know how they manage to get so many good reviews or how they erase the bad ones, because I'm sure I'm not the first nor the last to leave a bad impression of this firm, especially of attorney Cabrera. She was the one who attended to me, following all the protocols and acting like the best in her field. Unfortunately, when you look for a lawyer, it's because you really need guidance and, above all, solutions. Besides giving them our trust, we give them our money, which is where they focus their attention when their only real interest is to scam the client. They profit from the large sums they charge, even for cases like mine, where it was just a matter of changing my last name. I've been waiting for her to resolve this for almost two years now, and nothing. I contacted her because I didn't have the time, mainly because... It's something you can do yourself, but at that moment she made it clear that it wouldn't take much time and that she would do it without problems. She charged me a lot of money for what she was going to do, but thinking everything would be done quickly, I reluctantly handed over the money so that she... It's been two years now, and she's got me completely tangled up. I haven't even been able to continue the process myself, so my advice is to think twice about hiring a lawyer like her. Don't be fooled by the 5-star rating they claim for good service; it's clear they're not what they seem. I'm still waiting for her to at least answer my calls, since it's not her personally handling my case anymore, but her assistant... and she's no longer managing the process. I not only feel scammed, but I've also wasted all this time that could have been used for other procedures...
Very professional and honest with the information that they provided us with. Thank you so much Pablo Cabrera we appreciate your hard work and also to your staff. Excellent service!

First off I want to thank Mr Olegario Estrada and his whole team for helping me stay free and raise my 2 boys. Let me explain to you why I would highly recommend Estrada law Office. I was charged with an aggravated robbery when I was 17 years old, I immediately contacted Estrada law office. I remember feeling nervous and anxious every time going to court, but watching the way Olegario moves at work helped me be at ease. Everybody knew him, prosecutors, judges, other attorneys. Nobody else was recognized like he was. Anyways I watched peers my age get the same charge and they got sentenced to 10 yrs, 25 yrs, 40yrs. He helped me get probation 5 years deferred, that’s the same amount of time they gave to 2 defendants who “snitched” or were on a state witness list, that is also the least amount of time u can get for a aggravated robbery. I can’t even put in words what I felt when they gave me 5years deferred probation instead of sending me to prison, I got another chance at life. 3 years into my probation I was a passenger  in a vehicle that got pulled over, they found marijuana and a prohibited weapon (switch glock), my probation got violated. The gun was not mine but they still took me to jail and charged me with it. Prosecutor wanted me to do 15 years, prosecutor wouldn’t budge and that’s what he wanted me to do, 15 years for a gun that’s not mine. I can’t lie I was worried I thought I was going to have to do time and be away from my 2 boys for some years even though I knew the gun wasn’t mine. I had court for it yesterday, we had a contested hearing. I wish yall could had been there to see how easily he crushed the prosecutor. Court took maybe 5 min max. Judge looked at the prosecutor and said im reinstating him on probation. I went to work so happy after work, got out and took the mother of my kids to the movies, took a shower in my own shower,  went to sleep in my own bed. I honestly feel like I owe Mr. Estrada my life. If you’re looking for a great attorney who isn’t scared of prosecutors, someone who will get the job done and be completely honest and open with you, someone who will fight for you like you’re their own son, stop looking and get in contact with Law Office of Olegario Estrada.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

reviews.text:
I'll write this in Spanish too, because I don't want you to be scammed by this type of service that pretends to be professional, and then after you pay, they completely disappear without answering you or giving you any explanation. It's a complete scam, and you can lose more than 5,000, which isn't easy to earn, but for them it is, lying to you that they can help you and then they stop responding. This was my experience with Félix Gálvez and his paralegal.

Don't fall for this scam by people who call themselves professionals, because after you pay them they disappear and never answer you again, which is frustrating, and you can easily lose more than 5,000.

I’d like to thank the entire firm for their hard work regarding my removal proceedings case that seemed nearly impossible to win. I was required to show up for my individual hearing this March . Attorneys Felix & Miguel filed a motion to dismiss my case which in such a short amount of time seemed impossible to even receive a response before the court date . We submitted the motion two weeks ago and today it was the judge GRANTED the motion to dismiss !!! I am beyond grateful for all their support and effort . I’d also like to thank Paralegal Alejandra for all her patience and support ! She was very helpful throughout this process and kept us updated with everything happening . I am still in disbelief on how quick things moved in such a short amount of time. I would recommend this firm to anyone in need of a firm who will truly break it down for you with all honesty. I’d also like to mention they are very understanding with payments and will work out a plan for you . I am now looking forward to continue my path for hopefully residency in the future !! Thank you from the Cruz family 🙏🏼
reviews.ownerResponse: Ana, reading your message brought a big smile to our team. Removal proceedings can feel overwhelming, especially with an individual hearing approaching, and we knew how important that motion to dismiss was for you and your family. When the judge granted it, we were just as excited as you were. Felix and Miguel worked diligently on the strategy, and Alejandra will be so happy to know her patience and updates made a difference for you. Thank you for trusting us with such an important immigration matter. We look forward to continuing to support you as you pursue residency and build your future.

reviews.text:
We reached out to The Presti Law Firm when my husband was in immigration detention in Texas. It was one of the most difficult periods of our lives, and we felt completely overwhelmed and without options.

Filing a Habeas Corpus petition became our only real hope. Felix, our attorney, filed the Habeas in federal court, and soon after filing, the case began moving forward. Seeing progress so quickly gave our family the first real sense of hope after a long period of fear and uncertainty.

Throughout this process, Alejandro, the legal assistant, stayed in contact with us, answered our questions, and kept me informed. That communication meant so much during such a stressful and emotional time.

In the end, my husband was released. For our family, this was not just a legal result — it meant bringing a husband and father back home.

We are truly grateful for their professionalism, dedication, and the care they showed during one of the hardest moments of our lives. We will always remember what this meant for our family.
reviews.ownerResponse: Shahnoza, reading your words means more to us than we can fully express. We know how frightening and overwhelming immigration detention can be for a family, and we are honored that you trusted The Presti Law Firm during such a critical time. Filing a federal Habeas Corpus petition is never a small step, and we are grateful you recognized the work Felix put into moving the case forward so quickly. We are also glad Alejandro was able to stay closely connected with you throughout the process, because clear communication matters deeply when everything feels uncertain. Hearing that your husband is back home where he belongs is exactly why we do this work in immigration law. Thank you for allowing us to stand with your family during such a difficult chapter.

We recently completed our family-based green card process and could not be more grateful for the exceptional support we received. From filing to I-485 approval, the entire process took less than three months, which exceeded our expectations.

A heartfelt thank you to Maria Johnson, whose responsiveness, attention to detail, and steady guidance made what could have been a complex and stressful journey feel smooth and manageable. She was consistently thorough, clear, and supportive at every step, and it was truly a pleasure working with her.

We would also like to extend our sincere thanks to Alex Presti for his leadership and expertise. Please know that his team reflects the professionalism and care that clients hope for in an immigration law firm.

We are deeply appreciative of the dedication and care put into our case and would confidently recommend this firm to anyone seeking immigration assistance.

Thank you again for an excellent experience.
—Santhosh
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for sharing such a thoughtful review, Santhosh. Helping families through the green card process is important work, and it is great to hear the experience felt smooth, well organized, and faster than expected. Maria takes a lot of pride in being clear, responsive, and steady throughout each step, and your words reflect that care. Alex has built a team that works hard to deliver that level of service, and your recommendation means a great deal to all of us. We are grateful you trusted us with your immigration matter and wish you and your family all the best ahead!

reviews.text: Mr. Andrews is a fantastic personal injury attorney. He consistently worked to ensure I received the care I needed after a collision. He communicated clearly and professionally, and I always felt thoroughly informed about the details of my case and the direction it was headed. Mr. Andrews is a true advocate for his clients and will always be my first recommendation.

If you are in need of a good personal injury attorney, look no further than Jerry Andrews.

From beginning to end, Jerry was kind and honest with my case and helped me understand everything that was going on. Communication was top tier and I was never left wondering where my case was at in the legal steps. This team never let me down and worked diligently to get the results we did. I can’t thank both Jerry and his entire office enough for the dedication and footwork they put in for not just mine but I’m sure every case they handle.

Thank you for being so great and easy to work with!

Mr. Andrews has helped a family member, friend and me personally twice. Thankfully we were not at fault. He has always been upfront about fees, and the situation we were facing. He has fought in each situation for the best outcome. I have recommended and will continue to recommend Mr. Andrews.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Rachel. It is a pleasure to work for you and your amazing family!

reviews.text: Jerry took care of everything for me after I was in an accident. He made sure the at fault insurance company covered my medical bills and that I received compensation for future care. Really knows what he's doing!

A COMPLETE waste of time!!! When I saw so few reviews, I should have opted to go with a more reputable attorney's office. My bodily injury claim was supposed to be handled by this attorney, but I haven't heard from anyone in months. Everything was handled poorly from start to finish...just deplorable! I am now left with the task of obtaining a new (and far more reputable) attorney's office. I will also be filing a grievance with the state bar.  If you are looking for a qualified bodily injury attorney who will go hard for their clients, this isn't it. DO NOT WASTE YOUR TIME!!!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Shamel - I'm sorry you feel this way and would have appreciated a call or email from you to ask about your case, rather than a public review.  Please call me to talk about your case.

reviews.text: Jerry Andrews handled my case with respect and professionalism.  He achieved a successful resolution, and I would use his services again, hopefully will not need to!

My case was hard due to a very horrible insurance company, but after 2 years he not only got me more than i expected out of them, but also lowered my medical bills tremendously, i am very grateful to Jerry and his amazing team, he wont give up even after you do
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Braylen.  It was my pleasure to work for you. As you learned, having a quality insurance company on your auto is worth the extra cost when you have to make a claim, even if you were an innocent passenger as you were.  So happy we could get you taken care of! Blessings to you and yours.

reviews.text: Good trustworthy attorney.

Going through any legal process can be very devastating.  Mr. Andrews has many qualities that made the process bearable.  He is very honest, sincere and gives you his expertise on the case.  Above all when it comes to making a decision he would give me the pros and cons before asking me what I wanted to do.  Pretty much what you would expect and want from a professional attorney.

My family and I are very grateful for Mr. Andrews. He represented our child and was very sensitive to the case as our child went through a traumatic injury. Not only was he professional and beyond knowledgeable but he was very compassionate. We trusted him and he negotiated a settlement for our child. Mr. Andrews fought hard to get this settlement as the insurance company did not want to settle anything at all. However with his expertise, Mr. Andrews was able to get the settlement our son deserved. Thank you Mr. Andrews for your dedication to our child's case.

I was hit a by a driver with no insurance that totalled my car. Luckily I have uninsured motorists insurance and Andrew was able to exploit that to our benefit. I was given a nice 10k check free and clear after the dust settled.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the review Josh!  I'm glad it worked out and that you were wise enough to carry Uninsured Motorist insurance to protect yourself and your family from those drivers who violate Texas law and don't have liability insurance!

reviews.text: Jerry Andrews is a phenomenal attorney. He guides you through the entire process making sure you understand everything. He stays on top of things and keeps you we'll informed. He does not nickle and dime you for everything he does, which includes going well above and beyond his abligations as your attorney.  I would, and I have, recommended him highly. I was very happy with the large settlement l was awarded.

Jerry worked diligently to help my husband and I recover, physically and financially, after being struck by a negligent driver.  I won't hesitate to call him again, if the need should ever arise.  I can't imagine trying to deal with this mess ourselves.  He and his team are aggressive and professional, and easily accessible whenever I needed guidance.  They handled my case completely and turned a nightmare into a stress-free process.

I was involved in a car accident in Dallas and started receiving treatment here before I moved to another state. Even after I relocated, they continued to support me through the entire process without any hesitation.
Everyone was incredibly kind, patient, and professional. What I appreciated most was that they didn’t just focus on my medical treatment, they also helped me with the overall claims and compensation process. They took care of everything so I didn’t have to stress about paperwork or complicated procedures.
Their support truly made a difficult time much easier for me. I’m so thankful for all their help, and I would highly recommend this place to anyone who needs care and guidance after an accident.

This was my first accident, so I was flustered and didn't know what to do. However, they guided me step by step, allowing me to complete the case smoothly. I highly recommend Yi Law Group. I'm grateful to Director Park Se-ra and Esther for their hard work.
They were extremely kind, professional, and handled everything so well after my car accident. I had zero worries throughout the process, and the outcome was great. Highly recommend!

They took a complicated matter and never let me stress over it- they broke down every complicated information and provided me all the time to go over the concerns that I had.

Highly recommend them!

This is a place where we do our best from the moment of the car accident until the very end. I'm grateful to Director Park Se-ra, who is kind, and to the lawyers who worked hard to ensure a good outcome!

I truly appreciate their commitment and highly recommend Yi Law Group to anyone in need of reliable legal assistance.

Really thankful for the team at Yi Law Group.
